compliance.title: Jenny Compliance Advisor
compliance.subtitle: CA labor law expertise
compliance.greeting: Hi! I'm Jenny, your CA compliance advisor. Ask me anything or pick a question below.
compliance.q1: When do I need to give meal breaks?
compliance.q2: How does overtime work in California?
compliance.q3: Is my worker a contractor or employee?
compliance.q4: What are the penalties for missed breaks?

hr.title: Jenny HR Advisor
hr.subtitle: Workforce management guidance
hr.greeting: Hi! I'm Jenny, your HR advisor. Ask me anything or pick a question below.
hr.q1: What forms do I need for a new hire?
hr.q2: How do I properly terminate an employee?
hr.q3: Do I need an employee handbook?
hr.q4: W-2 vs 1099 — how do I classify workers?
